{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Mercy's Goldsign
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy's Goldsign]] is a black madra that she wears like gloves.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
